note: Adds the NameRegistry: agent names are unique across the arena (case-insensitive) and editable with limits (registry::rename, at most 3 lifetime and one per 30 days via Clock). claim_agent now reserves the name. Upgrade ladder 1/2.5/6/15 SUI, fees pool in the Treasury. Avow package (0x4f3e...a3ee) reused unchanged.

supersedes.reason: A partial setup on that package reserved the demo names; republished for a clean registry.
